Development underpins the summer solstice reversal of the effects of climate warming on the autumn phenology of European beech

Revised analysis of bud length data for experiment 1

Dominic Rebindaine

2025-09-18

Introduction

This document displays the analysis of bud length data of experiment 1 in “Development underpins the summer solstice reversal of the effects of climate warming on the autumn phenology of European beech” Rebindaine et al. (2025). The data is loaded and restructured, bud set dates (end-of-season, EOS) are derived and analysed in the context of the various treatments, then figures are plotted.

Load required packages

library(tidyverse)
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.5
## ✔ forcats   1.0.0     ✔ stringr   1.5.1
## ✔ ggplot2   3.5.2     ✔ tibble    3.3.0
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.4     ✔ tidyr     1.3.1
## ✔ purrr     1.1.0     
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
library(cropgrowdays)
library(lmerTest)

require(lme4)

library(vegan)

Configure input/output

input.path = '/Users/dominic/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Documents/PhD/development_2022_2023/analysis/experiment_1/data'


output.path = '/Users/dominic/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Documents/PhD/development_2022_2023/analysis/experiment_1/figures/buds'

Load and restructure data

# import data
bud.df = read.csv(paste(input.path, '2023_phen_exp_buds.csv', sep = '/'))

bud.df = bud.df %>% 
  mutate(treatment.timing = ifelse(group %in% c('N','P','O','Q'), 'July',
                                   ifelse(group %in% c('R','S','T','U'), 'August', 'Control')),
    cooling.level = ifelse(group %in% c('N','O','R','S'), 'Moderate',
                                ifelse(group %in% c('P','Q','T','U'), 'Extreme', 'Control')))

str(bud.df)
## 'data.frame':    2670 obs. of  10 variables:
##  $ id              : chr  "L199" "L200" "L201" "L202" ...
##  $ group           : chr  "L" "L" "L" "L" ...
##  $ number          : int  199 200 201 202 203 204 205 206 207 208 ...
##  $ cooling.level   : chr  "Control" "Control" "Control" "Control" ...
##  $ lo.timing       : chr  "early" "early" "early" "early" ...
##  $ treatment.timing: chr  "Control" "Control" "Control" "Control" ...
##  $ lo.doy          : int  131 136 136 131 131 129 131 121 142 129 ...
##  $ measurement.date: chr  "04.07.23" "04.07.23" "04.07.23" "04.07.23" ...
##  $ apical          : chr  "5.81" "6.83" "5.2" "4.25" ...
##  $ lateral         : num  4.92 6.08 5.31 4.38 7.4 4.88 3.22 5.46 5.2 4.24 ...
# recode vars
bud.df$apical = as.numeric(bud.df$apical)
## Warning: NAs introduced by coercion
bud.df$measurement.date = as.Date(bud.df$measurement.date, format = '%d.%m.%y')

# make the data frame long format
bud.df = bud.df %>% 
          pivot_longer(-c('id', 'group', 'number', 'cooling.level', 'lo.timing', 'treatment.timing', 'lo.doy', 'measurement.date'),
                    names_to = 'bud.type', values_to = 'bud.length') %>% 
  # remove NAs
  filter(!is.na(bud.length)) %>% 
     # group to individ bud
  group_by(id, bud.type) %>% 
   # only keep buds with more than 8 measurements
  filter(n() >= 8) %>% 
  ungroup()

# Add measurement.doy column
bud.df$measurement.doy = day_of_year(bud.df$measurement.date)

# get mean and sd of groups over time
sum_buds = bud.df %>% 
  group_by(group,measurement.doy,measurement.date,treatment.timing,lo.timing,cooling.level) %>% 
  summarise(across(bud.length, list(mean = mean, sd = sd), na.rm =T))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `summarise()`.
## ℹ In argument: `across(bud.length, list(mean = mean, sd = sd), na.rm = T)`.
## ℹ In group 1: `group = "L"`, `measurement.doy = 185`, `measurement.date =
##   2023-07-04`, `treatment.timing = "Control"`, `lo.timing = "early"`,
##   `cooling.level = "Control"`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! The `...` argument of `across()` is deprecated as of dplyr 1.1.0.
## Supply arguments directly to `.fns` through an anonymous function instead.
## 
##   # Previously
##   across(a:b, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
## 
##   # Now
##   across(a:b, \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'group', 'measurement.doy',
## 'measurement.date', 'treatment.timing', 'lo.timing'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.

Sample sizes

# Observed buds per treatment
table(bud.df[bud.df$measurement.date=="2023-08-29",]$group, bud.df[bud.df$measurement.date=="2023-11-02",]$bud.type)
##    
##     apical lateral
##   L     27      27
##   M     24      26
##   N     26      26
##   O     27      27
##   P     27      27
##   Q     27      27
##   R     26      27
##   S     27      27
##   T     26      26
##   U     26      27
# Number of individual trees
length(unique(bud.df$id))
## [1] 267
# Number of individual trees per treatment
length(unique(bud.df[bud.df$group=="L",]$id))
## [1] 27
length(unique(bud.df[bud.df$group=="M",]$id))
## [1] 26
length(unique(bud.df[bud.df$group=="N",]$id))
## [1] 26
length(unique(bud.df[bud.df$group=="O",]$id))
## [1] 27
length(unique(bud.df[bud.df$group=="P",]$id))
## [1] 27
length(unique(bud.df[bud.df$group=="Q",]$id))
## [1] 27
length(unique(bud.df[bud.df$group=="R",]$id))
## [1] 27
length(unique(bud.df[bud.df$group=="S",]$id))
## [1] 27
length(unique(bud.df[bud.df$group=="T",]$id))
## [1] 26
length(unique(bud.df[bud.df$group=="U",]$id))
## [1] 27

Compute bud growth and relative bud lengths

####################################################
## Get relative and absolute bud growth
####################################################

bud.df = bud.df %>%
  group_by(id, bud.type) %>%
  mutate(
    # Get relative bud length per individual
    bud.rel = bud.length / max(bud.length),
    # Get bud growth rates per individual
    across(bud.length, ~c(NA, diff(.)), .names = "bud.growth"),
    # Get relative bud growth rates per individual
    across(bud.rel, ~c(NA, diff(.)), .names = "relbud.growth"),
    # Get date of maximum bud length per individual
    date.max.bud = measurement.date[which.max(bud.length)]) %>%
  ungroup()

######################################################################
## Mean bud growth per treatment
######################################################################

minbud.df = bud.df %>% 
  group_by(id, bud.type) %>% 
  filter(row_number() <= which.min(bud.length)) %>% 
  select(id, group, bud.type, bud.length, bud.rel, date.max.bud)

maxbud.df = bud.df %>% 
  group_by(id, bud.type) %>% 
  filter(row_number() == min(which(bud.rel > 0.9))) %>% 
  select(id, group, bud.type, bud.length, bud.rel, date.max.bud)

minmaxbud.df = merge(minbud.df, maxbud.df, by = c('id', 'bud.type'))

minmaxbud.df = minmaxbud.df %>% 
  group_by(id, bud.type) %>% 
  mutate(diff = bud.length.y - bud.length.x,
         total.rel.growth = (1-bud.length.x/bud.length.y)*100)

averages = minmaxbud.df %>% 
  group_by(group.x) %>% 
  summarise(meandiff = round(mean(diff),2),
            ci.diff = round(1.96*standard_error(diff),2),
            ci.lower.diff = round(meandiff - 1.96*standard_error(diff),2),
            ci.upper.diff = round(meandiff + 1.96*standard_error(diff),2),
            mean.total.rel = round(mean(total.rel.growth),2),
            ci.total.rel = round(1.96*standard_error(total.rel.growth),2),
            ci.lower.rel = round(mean.total.rel - 1.96*standard_error(total.rel.growth),2),
            ci.upper.rel = round(mean.total.rel + 1.96*standard_error(total.rel.growth),2))

# check if any buds were over 90% of their final length at first measurement
over90start = bud.df %>% 
  group_by(id,bud.type) %>% 
  summarise(first = first(bud.rel)) %>% filter(first >= 0.9) # none
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'id'. You can override using the `.groups`
## argument.

Plot theme

  plotTheme1 = theme(
    legend.position   = "right",
    legend.background = element_rect(fill=NA, linewidth=0.5, linetype="solid"),
    legend.text       = element_text(color="black"),
    panel.background  = element_blank(),
    axis.text         = element_text(colour = "black"),
    panel.border      = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA),
    axis.line         = element_line(color = "black"),
    strip.background  = element_rect(fill=NA),
    strip.text        = element_text(colour = 'black'),
    plot.title        = element_text(face="bold",hjust = 0.5))
  
  budpal = c('#a6cee3','#1f78b4','#b2df8a','#33a02c','#fb9a99','#e31a1c','#fdbf6f','#ff7f00','#cab2d6','#6a3d9a')

EOS (bud set timing) derivation

# Interpolate 90% bud set dates from seasonal bud length measurements
bud.data.90 = bud.df %>%
  group_by(id, group, bud.type, lo.doy) %>%
  # Find the last row with <90% bud length in each group, keep only this row and next
   filter(row_number() <= min(which(bud.rel > 0.9)),
          row_number() >= min(which(bud.rel > 0.9))-1) %>%
  #Linear interpolation
  summarize(EOS     = as.Date(approx(bud.rel, measurement.date, .9,  ties=min)$y, origin="1970-01-01")) %>%
  mutate(EOS.DOY    = yday(EOS)) %>%
  ungroup()
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'id', 'group', 'bud.type'. You can override
## using the `.groups` argument.
# Mean EOS DOY per treatment
##############################

eos.doy.mean = bud.data.90 %>% group_by(group) %>% 
  summarise(mean.EOS.DOY = round(mean(EOS.DOY),0))

# Buds analysis data summary
##############################
BudsSummary = merge(bud.data.90, minmaxbud.df, by = c('id', 'bud.type')) %>% 
  select(id, bud.type, group, lo.doy, EOS, EOS.DOY, bud.length.x, bud.length.y, diff, total.rel.growth)

AverageSummary = BudsSummary %>% 
  group_by(group) %>% 
  summarise(
    mean.LO.DOY = round(mean(lo.doy),1),
            ci.lower.LO = round(mean.LO.DOY - 1.96*standard_error(lo.doy),1),
            ci.upper.LO = round(mean.LO.DOY + 1.96*standard_error(lo.doy),1),
    meanEOS.DOY = round(mean(EOS.DOY),1),
            ci.lower.EOS = round(meanEOS.DOY - 1.96*standard_error(EOS.DOY),1),
            ci.upper.EOS = round(meanEOS.DOY + 1.96*standard_error(EOS.DOY),1),
    meandiff = round(mean(diff),2),
            ci.lower.diff = round(meandiff - 1.96*standard_error(diff),2),
            ci.upper.diff = round(meandiff + 1.96*standard_error(diff),2),
    mean.total.rel = round(mean(total.rel.growth),2),
            ci.lower.rel = round(mean.total.rel - 1.96*standard_error(total.rel.growth),2),
            ci.upper.rel = round(mean.total.rel + 1.96*standard_error(total.rel.growth),2))

Complete dataframe

# Translate lettered groups into treatment descriptions
BudsSummary = BudsSummary %>% 
  mutate(lo.timing = ifelse(group %in% c('L','N','P','R','T'), 'early','late'),
    treatment.timing = ifelse(group %in% c('N','P','O','Q'), 'July',
                                   ifelse(group %in% c('R','S','T','U'), 'August', 'Control')),
    cooling.level = ifelse(group %in% c('N','O','R','S'), 'Moderate',
                                ifelse(group %in% c('P','Q','T','U'), 'Extreme', 'Control')),
    # add another column to combine treatment.timing and cooling.level
    treat.cool.combined = paste(treatment.timing, cooling.level,sep = "."))

# save prepared data
#write_csv(BudsSummary, file = paste(input.path, "bud_data_experiment1.csv", sep = "/"))

######### factorise and relevel predictors

# leaf-out timing
BudsSummary$lo.timing = as.factor(BudsSummary$lo.timing)

# treatment timing
BudsSummary$treatment.timing = as.factor(BudsSummary$treatment.timing)
BudsSummary$treatment.timing = fct_relevel(BudsSummary$treatment.timing, 'Control', 'July')

# cooling level
BudsSummary$cooling.level = as.factor(BudsSummary$cooling.level)
BudsSummary$cooling.level = fct_relevel(BudsSummary$cooling.level, 'Control', 'Moderate')

# treat.cool.combined
BudsSummary$treat.cool.combined = as.factor(BudsSummary$treat.cool.combined)
BudsSummary$treat.cool.combined = fct_relevel(BudsSummary$treat.cool.combined, 'Control.Control', 'July.Moderate', 'July.Extreme', 'August.Moderate', 'August.Extreme')

EOS Analysis

### Linear modelling of bud set timing with bud type (apical vs lateral) as fixed effect

# Treatment as number factor
BudsSummary = BudsSummary %>% 
  mutate(Treatment = as.factor(ifelse(group %in% 
c("L"),1,
                            ifelse(group %in% c("M"),2, 
                                ifelse(group %in% c("N"),3,
                                   ifelse(group %in% c("O"),4, 
                                          ifelse(group %in% c("P"),5,
                                                 ifelse(group %in% c("Q"),6,
                                                  ifelse(group %in% 
c("R"), 7, 
                                          ifelse(group %in% 
c("S"), 8,                
                                            ifelse(group %in% 
c("T"),9,

10
                                      
                                      )))))))))))

## Treatment as fixed predictor variable
resultsLM = BudsSummary %>% 
  do({model = lm(EOS.DOY ~ Treatment + bud.type, data=.)  # create the model
  data.frame(tidy(model))}) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
  mutate(term = factor(term, levels = c("Treatment2", "Treatment3", "Treatment4", "Treatment5", "Treatment6", "Treatment7", "Treatment8", "Treatment9", "Treatment10", "bud.typelateral")), SEx2 = std.error*2)

resultsLM = resultsLM %>% mutate(term = c("Late_control_control", "Early_july_Moderate", "Late_july_Moderate", "Early_july_Extreme", "Late_july_Extreme", "Early_august_Moderate", "Late_august_Moderate", "Early_august_Extreme", "Late_august_Extreme", "lateral_bud"))
       
#Show results
as.data.frame(resultsLM) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##                     term estimate std.error p.value SEx2
## 1   Late_control_control     3.58      1.31    0.01 2.62
## 2    Early_july_Moderate     1.37      1.30    0.29 2.60
## 3     Late_july_Moderate     8.44      1.29    0.00 2.57
## 4     Early_july_Extreme     2.65      1.29    0.04 2.57
## 5      Late_july_Extreme     7.61      1.29    0.00 2.57
## 6  Early_august_Moderate    -4.49      1.29    0.00 2.58
## 7   Late_august_Moderate    -0.78      1.29    0.55 2.57
## 8   Early_august_Extreme    -1.90      1.30    0.14 2.60
## 9    Late_august_Extreme     1.70      1.29    0.19 2.58
## 10           lateral_bud    -1.10      0.58    0.06 1.16
## Leaf-out timing as fixed predictor variable
resultsLM.LO = BudsSummary %>% 
  do({model = lm(EOS.DOY ~ lo.timing + bud.type, data=.)  # create the model
   data.frame(tidy(model))}) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
  mutate(SEx2 = std.error*2)

#Show results
as.data.frame(resultsLM.LO) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##              term estimate std.error p.value SEx2
## 1   lo.timinglate     4.59      0.63    0.00 1.27
## 2 bud.typelateral    -1.13      0.63    0.08 1.27

Early groups only model

resultsLM.Early = BudsSummary %>% 
  filter(lo.timing == 'early') %>% 
do({model = lm(EOS.DOY ~ group + bud.type, data=.)  # create the model
  data.frame(tidy(model))}) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
 mutate(term = factor(term, levels = c("groupN", "groupP", "groupR", "groupT", "bud.typelateral")),
        SEx2 = std.error*2,
        lo.timing = 'early')
  
#Show results
as.data.frame(resultsLM.Early) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##              term estimate std.error p.value SEx2 lo.timing
## 1          groupN     1.37      1.29    0.29 2.59     early
## 2          groupP     2.65      1.28    0.04 2.56     early
## 3          groupR    -4.50      1.29    0.00 2.58     early
## 4          groupT    -1.90      1.29    0.14 2.59     early
## 5 bud.typelateral    -0.04      0.82    0.96 1.64     early
# save results for plotting later
toplot.resultsLM.Early = as.data.frame(resultsLM.Early) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  filter(term != "bud.typelateral") %>% # drop bud type term 
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)

Late groups only model

resultsLM.Late = BudsSummary %>% 
  filter(lo.timing == 'late') %>% 
do({model = lm(EOS.DOY ~ group + bud.type, data=.)  # create the model
  data.frame(tidy(model))}) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
 mutate(term = factor(term, levels = c("groupO", "groupQ", "groupS", "groupU", "bud.typelateral")),
        SEx2 = std.error*2,
        lo.timing = 'late')
  
#Show results
as.data.frame(resultsLM.Late) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)   
##              term estimate std.error p.value SEx2 lo.timing
## 1          groupO     4.84      1.31    0.00 2.62      late
## 2          groupQ     4.01      1.31    0.00 2.62      late
## 3          groupS    -4.38      1.31    0.00 2.62      late
## 4          groupU    -1.89      1.32    0.15 2.63      late
## 5 bud.typelateral    -2.17      0.82    0.01 1.64      late
# save results for plotting later
toplot.resultsLM.Late = as.data.frame(resultsLM.Late) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
    filter(term != "bud.typelateral") %>% # drop bud type term 
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)

# merge early and late dfs for plotting later
toplot.resultsLMEarlyLate = rbind(toplot.resultsLM.Early,toplot.resultsLM.Late)

# relevel factors to put treatment pairs in right order
toplot.resultsLMEarlyLate$term = fct_relevel(toplot.resultsLMEarlyLate$term, 'groupN', 'groupO', 'groupP', 'groupQ', 'groupR', 'groupS', 'groupT', 'groupU')

L vs M analysis

resultsLM.LvM = BudsSummary %>% 
  filter(group %in% c('L','M')) %>% 
do({model = lm(EOS.DOY ~ group + bud.type, data=.)  # create the model
  data.frame(tidy(model))}) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
 mutate(term = factor(term, levels = c("groupM", "bud.typelateral")),SEx2 = std.error*2)
  
       
#Show results
as.data.frame(resultsLM.LvM) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##              term estimate std.error p.value SEx2
## 1          groupM      3.6      1.11    0.00 2.22
## 2 bud.typelateral     -2.2      1.11    0.05 2.22

N vs O analysis

resultsLM.NvO = BudsSummary %>% 
  filter(group %in% c('N','O')) %>% 
do({model = lm(EOS.DOY ~ group + bud.type, data=.)  # create the model
  data.frame(tidy(model))}) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
 mutate(term = factor(term, levels = c("groupO", "bud.typelateral")),SEx2 = std.error*2)
  
       
#Show results
as.data.frame(resultsLM.NvO) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##              term estimate std.error p.value SEx2
## 1          groupO     7.08       1.3    0.00  2.6
## 2 bud.typelateral    -2.42       1.3    0.07  2.6

P vs Q analysis

resultsLM.PvQ = BudsSummary %>% 
  filter(group %in% c('P','Q')) %>% 
do({model = lm(EOS.DOY ~ group + bud.type, data=.)  # create the model
  data.frame(tidy(model))}) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
 mutate(term = factor(term, levels = c("groupQ", "bud.typelateral")),SEx2 = std.error*2)
  
       
#Show results
as.data.frame(resultsLM.PvQ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##              term estimate std.error p.value SEx2
## 1          groupQ     4.96      1.41    0.00 2.82
## 2 bud.typelateral    -1.52      1.41    0.28 2.82

R vs S analysis

resultsLM.RvS = BudsSummary %>% 
  filter(group %in% c('R','S')) %>% 
do({model = lm(EOS.DOY ~ group + bud.type, data=.)  # create the model
  data.frame(tidy(model))}) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
 mutate(term = factor(term, levels = c("groupS", "bud.typelateral")),SEx2 = std.error*2)
  
       
#Show results
as.data.frame(resultsLM.RvS) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##              term estimate std.error p.value SEx2
## 1          groupS     3.70      1.24    0.00 2.48
## 2 bud.typelateral    -2.11      1.24    0.09 2.48

T vs U analysis

resultsLM.TvU = BudsSummary %>% 
  filter(group %in% c('T','U')) %>% 
do({model = lm(EOS.DOY ~ group + bud.type, data=.)  # create the model
  data.frame(tidy(model))}) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
 mutate(term = factor(term, levels = c("groupU", "bud.typelateral")),SEx2 = std.error*2)
  
       
#Show results
as.data.frame(resultsLM.TvU) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##              term estimate std.error p.value SEx2
## 1          groupU     3.57      1.35    0.01  2.7
## 2 bud.typelateral     2.76      1.35    0.04  2.7

Days of autumn delay per day of spring delay

##################################################################################
## Linear mixed effects model on Autumn bud set change per day change in leaf-out
##################################################################################

## Leaf-out doy as fixed predictor variable with treatment combination (timing plus cooling level) as a random variable
resultsLM.LOD = BudsSummary %>% 
  do({model = lme4::lmer(EOS.DOY ~ lo.doy + bud.type + (1|treat.cool.combined), data=.)  # create the model
  data.frame(tidy(model, effect="fixed"))}) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
  mutate(SEx2 = std.error*2)

#Show results
as.data.frame(resultsLM.LOD) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##   effect            term estimate std.error SEx2
## 1  fixed          lo.doy     0.24      0.03 0.06
## 2  fixed bud.typelateral    -1.10      0.58 1.16
## Linear model using only control treatments
resultsLM.LOD.Control = BudsSummary %>% filter(group %in% c('L','M')) %>% 
  do({model = lm(EOS.DOY ~ lo.doy + bud.type, data=.)  # create the model
  data.frame(tidy(model))}) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
  mutate(SEx2 = std.error*2)

#Show results
as.data.frame(resultsLM.LOD.Control) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##              term estimate std.error p.value SEx2
## 1          lo.doy     0.18      0.06    0.00 0.12
## 2 bud.typelateral    -2.18      1.12    0.05 2.24

Variance partitioning

Partition variance explained by early-season development and late-season temperature Early-season development is represented by the leaf-out day-of-year. Late-season temperature is represented by summer cooling treatment 9the combination of treatment timing (July vs August) and cooling level (Moderate vs Extreme).

# linear model
varpart.model = lm(
  EOS.DOY ~ lo.doy + treat.cool.combined + bud.type,
  data = BudsSummary
)


# Fixed effect decomposition
varpart.model.anova = anova(varpart.model)

# Calculate % variance explained by each fixed effect
ss_total = sum(varpart.model.anova$`Sum Sq`)
varpart.model.anova$PercVar = 100 * varpart.model.anova$`Sum Sq` / ss_total
varpart.model.anova
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: EOS.DOY
##                      Df  Sum Sq Mean Sq F value   Pr(>F) PercVar
## lo.doy                1  2812.2 2812.22 62.9358 0.000000   9.041
## treat.cool.combined   4  4763.0 1190.76 26.6485 0.000000  15.313
## bud.type              1   160.0  159.97  3.5801 0.059029   0.514
## Residuals           523 23369.7   44.68                   75.132
# Model matrices
dev.mat  = model.matrix(~ lo.timing, data = BudsSummary)[, -1]
temp.mat = model.matrix(~ treat.cool.combined, data = BudsSummary)[, -1]
bud.mat  = model.matrix(~ bud.type, data = BudsSummary)[, -1]

# Variance partitioning with bud.type partialled out
vp = varpart(BudsSummary$EOS.DOY, dev.mat, temp.mat, bud.mat)
vp
## 
## Partition of variance in RDA 
## 
## Call: varpart(Y = BudsSummary$EOS.DOY, X = dev.mat, temp.mat, bud.mat)
## 
## Explanatory tables:
## X1:  dev.mat
## X2:  temp.mat
## X3:  bud.mat 
## 
## No. of explanatory tables: 3 
## Total variation (SS): 31105 
##             Variance: 58.799 
## No. of observations: 530 
## 
## Partition table:
##                       Df R.square Adj.R.square Testable
## [a+d+f+g] = X1         1  0.08969      0.08797     TRUE
## [b+d+e+g] = X2         4  0.15210      0.14564     TRUE
## [c+e+f+g] = X3         1  0.00529      0.00341     TRUE
## [a+b+d+e+f+g] = X1+X2  5  0.24177      0.23454     TRUE
## [a+c+d+e+f+g] = X1+X3  2  0.09515      0.09172     TRUE
## [b+c+d+e+f+g] = X2+X3  5  0.15716      0.14912     TRUE
## [a+b+c+d+e+f+g] = All  6  0.24700      0.23836     TRUE
## Individual fractions                                   
## [a] = X1 | X2+X3       1               0.08924     TRUE
## [b] = X2 | X1+X3       4               0.14664     TRUE
## [c] = X3 | X1+X2       1               0.00382     TRUE
## [d]                    0              -0.00093    FALSE
## [e]                    0              -0.00007    FALSE
## [f]                    0              -0.00035    FALSE
## [g]                    0               0.00001    FALSE
## [h] = Residuals                        0.76164    FALSE
## Controlling 1 table X                                  
## [a+d] = X1 | X3        1               0.08831     TRUE
## [a+f] = X1 | X2        1               0.08890     TRUE
## [b+d] = X2 | X3        4               0.14571     TRUE
## [b+e] = X2 | X1        4               0.14657     TRUE
## [c+e] = X3 | X1        1               0.00375     TRUE
## [c+f] = X3 | X2        1               0.00347     TRUE
## ---
## Use function 'rda' to test significance of fractions of interest
summary(vp)
## 
## Unique fractions and total with shared fractions equally allocated:
## 
##     Unique Contributed Component
## X1 0.08924     0.08861   dev.mat
## X2 0.14664     0.14614  temp.mat
## X3 0.00382     0.00361   bud.mat
## 
## Contributions of fractions to sets:
## 
##            X1        X2        X3
## [a]  8.92e-02                    
## [b]            1.47e-01          
## [c]                      3.82e-03
## [d] -4.67e-04 -4.67e-04          
## [e]           -3.68e-05 -3.68e-05
## [f] -1.73e-04           -1.73e-04
## [g]  1.87e-06  1.87e-06  1.87e-06
showvarparts(3)

plot(vp)

# Extract fractions
fractions = vp$part$fract

# Turn into a table
results = data.frame(
  Effect = rownames(fractions),
  R2 = round(fractions$Adj.R.square,2),
  PercVar = round(100 * fractions$Adj.R.square,2)
)

results
##                  Effect   R2 PercVar
## 1        [a+d+f+g] = X1 0.09    8.80
## 2        [b+d+e+g] = X2 0.15   14.56
## 3        [c+e+f+g] = X3 0.00    0.34
## 4 [a+b+d+e+f+g] = X1+X2 0.23   23.45
## 5 [a+c+d+e+f+g] = X1+X3 0.09    9.17
## 6 [b+c+d+e+f+g] = X2+X3 0.15   14.91
## 7 [a+b+c+d+e+f+g] = All 0.24   23.84

Relative Bud growth

Setup

# Treatment as number factor in new df
BudGrowth.df = bud.df %>% 
  mutate(Treatment = as.factor(ifelse(group %in% 
c("L"),1,
                            ifelse(group %in% c("M"),2, 
                                ifelse(group %in% c("N"),3,
                                   ifelse(group %in% c("O"),4, 
                                          ifelse(group %in% c("P"),5,
                                                 ifelse(group %in% c("Q"),6,
                                                  ifelse(group %in% 
c("R"), 7, 
                                          ifelse(group %in% 
c("S"), 8,                
                                            ifelse(group %in% 
c("T"),9,

10
                                      
                                      ))))))))))) %>% 
  group_by(Treatment, id, bud.type) %>% 
  # calculate relative bud growth for all buds
  summarize(RelAutGrowth = (1-(min(bud.length)/max(bud.length)))*100) %>% 
  ungroup()
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'Treatment', 'id'. You can override using
## the `.groups` argument.

All treatments

########################################################## 
## Linear model on Autumn bud growth
##########################################################

# model with treatment as fixed predictor
resultsRelAutGrowth = BudGrowth.df %>% 
  do({model = lm(RelAutGrowth ~ Treatment + bud.type, data=.)
  data.frame(tidy(model))})


#Show results
Intercept = resultsRelAutGrowth[1,]$estimate
as.data.frame(resultsRelAutGrowth) %>%
    mutate(term = c("Intercept", "Late_control_control", "Early_july_Moderate", "Late_july_Moderate", "Early_july_Extreme", "Late_july_Extreme", "Early_august_Moderate", "Late_august_Moderate", "Early_august_Extreme", "Late_august_Extreme", "bud.typelateral")) %>% 
  #get relative autumn growth change
  mutate(PercentGrowthChange = estimate/Intercept*100,
         PercentGrowth.se = std.error/Intercept*100) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##                     term estimate std.error p.value PercentGrowthChange
## 1              Intercept    69.81      0.95    0.00              100.00
## 2   Late_control_control     4.14      1.31    0.00                5.93
## 3    Early_july_Moderate     0.62      1.30    0.63                0.89
## 4     Late_july_Moderate     2.51      1.28    0.05                3.60
## 5     Early_july_Extreme     3.21      1.28    0.01                4.59
## 6      Late_july_Extreme     1.87      1.28    0.15                2.68
## 7  Early_august_Moderate    -0.98      1.29    0.45               -1.40
## 8   Late_august_Moderate    -0.71      1.28    0.58               -1.01
## 9   Early_august_Extreme    -5.06      1.30    0.00               -7.25
## 10   Late_august_Extreme    -2.79      1.29    0.03               -4.00
## 11       bud.typelateral     3.21      0.58    0.00                4.60
##    PercentGrowth.se
## 1              1.37
## 2              1.88
## 3              1.86
## 4              1.84
## 5              1.84
## 6              1.84
## 7              1.85
## 8              1.84
## 9              1.86
## 10             1.85
## 11             0.83

Early Bud Growth only

resultsRelAutGrowthEarly = BudGrowth.df %>% 
  filter(Treatment %in% c(1,3,5,7,9)) %>% 
  do({model = lm(RelAutGrowth ~ Treatment + bud.type, data=.)
  data.frame(tidy(model))})


#Show results
InterceptEarly = resultsRelAutGrowthEarly[1,]$estimate

as.data.frame(resultsRelAutGrowthEarly) %>%
    mutate(term = c("InterceptEarly", "Early_july_Moderate", "Early_july_Extreme", "Early_august_Moderate", "Early_august_Extreme", "bud.typelateral")) %>% 
  #get relative autumn growth change
  mutate(PercentGrowthChange = estimate/InterceptEarly*100,
         PercentGrowth.se = std.error/InterceptEarly*100,
         lo.timing = 'early') %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##                    term estimate std.error p.value PercentGrowthChange
## 1        InterceptEarly    70.45      0.90    0.00              100.00
## 2   Early_july_Moderate     0.62      1.17    0.59                0.88
## 3    Early_july_Extreme     3.21      1.16    0.01                4.55
## 4 Early_august_Moderate    -0.97      1.16    0.41               -1.37
## 5  Early_august_Extreme    -5.06      1.17    0.00               -7.18
## 6       bud.typelateral     1.93      0.74    0.01                2.74
##   PercentGrowth.se lo.timing
## 1             1.28     early
## 2             1.66     early
## 3             1.64     early
## 4             1.65     early
## 5             1.66     early
## 6             1.05     early
toplot.resultsRelAutGrowthEarly = as.data.frame(resultsRelAutGrowthEarly) %>%
    mutate(term = c("InterceptEarly", "Early_july_Moderate", "Early_july_Extreme", "Early_august_Moderate", "Early_august_Extreme",
                    "bud.typelateral")) %>% 
  filter(term != "bud.typelateral") %>% 
  #get relative autumn growth change
  mutate(PercentGrowthChange = estimate/InterceptEarly*100,
         PercentGrowth.se = std.error/InterceptEarly*100,
         lo.timing = 'early') %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)

Late Bud Growth only

resultsRelAutGrowthLate = BudGrowth.df %>% 
  filter(Treatment %in% c(2,4,6,8,10)) %>% 
  do({model = lm(RelAutGrowth ~ Treatment + bud.type, data=.)
  data.frame(tidy(model))})


#Show results
InterceptLate = resultsRelAutGrowthLate[1,]$estimate

as.data.frame(resultsRelAutGrowthLate) %>%
    mutate(term = c("InterceptLate", "Late_july_Moderate", "Late_july_Extreme", "Late_august_Moderate", "Late_august_Extreme", "bud.typelateral")) %>% 
  #get relative autumn growth change
  mutate(PercentGrowthChange = estimate/InterceptLate*100,
         PercentGrowth.se = std.error/InterceptLate*100,
         lo.timing = 'late') %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##                   term estimate std.error p.value PercentGrowthChange
## 1        InterceptLate    73.28      1.12    0.00              100.00
## 2   Late_july_Moderate    -1.60      1.42    0.26               -2.19
## 3    Late_july_Extreme    -2.24      1.42    0.12               -3.06
## 4 Late_august_Moderate    -4.82      1.42    0.00               -6.58
## 5  Late_august_Extreme    -6.92      1.42    0.00               -9.44
## 6      bud.typelateral     4.49      0.89    0.00                6.13
##   PercentGrowth.se lo.timing
## 1             1.53      late
## 2             1.93      late
## 3             1.93      late
## 4             1.93      late
## 5             1.94      late
## 6             1.21      late
toplot.resultsRelAutGrowthLate = as.data.frame(resultsRelAutGrowthLate) %>%
    mutate(term = c("InterceptLate", "Late_july_Moderate", "Late_july_Extreme", "Late_august_Moderate", "Late_august_Extreme","bud.typelateral")) %>% 
  filter(term != "bud.typelateral") %>% 
  #get relative autumn growth change
  mutate(PercentGrowthChange = estimate/InterceptLate*100,
         PercentGrowth.se = std.error/InterceptLate*100,
         lo.timing = 'late') %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)

# combine early and late into one df, make term a factor and relevel
toplot.resultsRelAutGrowth = rbind(toplot.resultsRelAutGrowthEarly, toplot.resultsRelAutGrowthLate)

toplot.resultsRelAutGrowth$term = as.factor(toplot.resultsRelAutGrowth$term)

toplot.resultsRelAutGrowth$term = fct_relevel(toplot.resultsRelAutGrowth$term, "InterceptEarly","InterceptLate","Early_july_Moderate","Late_july_Moderate","Early_july_Extreme","Late_july_Extreme","Early_august_Moderate","Late_august_Moderate","Early_august_Extreme","Late_august_Extreme")

Absolute Bud Growth

Early Abs Bud Growth

resultsAbsAutGrowthEarly = BudsSummary %>% 
  filter(Treatment %in% c(1,3,5,7,9)) %>% 
  do({model = lm(diff ~ Treatment + bud.type, data=.)
  data.frame(tidy(model))})

#Show results
InterceptAbsEarly = resultsAbsAutGrowthEarly[1,]$estimate

as.data.frame(resultsAbsAutGrowthEarly) %>%
    mutate(term = c("InterceptAbsEarly", "Early_july_Moderate", "Early_july_Extreme", "Early_august_Moderate", "Early_august_Extreme", "bud.typelateral")) %>% 
  #get relative autumn growth change
  mutate(PercentGrowthChange = estimate/InterceptAbsEarly*100,
         PercentGrowth.se = std.error/InterceptAbsEarly*100,
         lo.timing = 'early') %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##                    term estimate std.error p.value PercentGrowthChange
## 1     InterceptAbsEarly    13.44      0.36    0.00              100.00
## 2   Early_july_Moderate    -1.93      0.47    0.00              -14.39
## 3    Early_july_Extreme    -1.99      0.47    0.00              -14.82
## 4 Early_august_Moderate    -0.02      0.47    0.96               -0.18
## 5  Early_august_Extreme    -3.17      0.47    0.00              -23.57
## 6       bud.typelateral    -1.11      0.30    0.00               -8.26
##   PercentGrowth.se lo.timing
## 1             2.69     early
## 2             3.50     early
## 3             3.47     early
## 4             3.49     early
## 5             3.50     early
## 6             2.22     early
toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowthEarly = as.data.frame(resultsAbsAutGrowthEarly) %>%
    mutate(term = c("InterceptAbsEarly", "Early_july_Moderate", "Early_july_Extreme", "Early_august_Moderate", "Early_august_Extreme", "bud.typelateral")) %>% 
  filter(term != "bud.typelateral") %>% 
  #get relative autumn growth change
  mutate(PercentGrowthChange = estimate/InterceptAbsEarly*100,
         PercentGrowth.se = std.error/InterceptAbsEarly*100,
         lo.timing = 'early') %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)

Late Abs Bud Growth

resultsAbsAutGrowthLate = BudsSummary %>% 
  filter(Treatment %in% c(2,4,6,8,10)) %>% 
  do({model = lm(diff ~ Treatment + bud.type, data=.)
  data.frame(tidy(model))})

#Show results
InterceptAbsLate = resultsAbsAutGrowthLate[1,]$estimate

as.data.frame(resultsAbsAutGrowthLate) %>%
    mutate(term = c("InterceptAbsLate", "Late_july_Moderate", "Late_july_Extreme", "Late_august_Moderate", "Late_august_Extreme", "bud.typelateral")) %>% 
  #get relative autumn growth change
  mutate(PercentGrowthChange = estimate/InterceptAbsLate*100,
         PercentGrowth.se = std.error/InterceptAbsLate*100,
         lo.timing = 'late') %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)
##                   term estimate std.error p.value PercentGrowthChange
## 1     InterceptAbsLate    14.47      0.38     0.0              100.00
## 2   Late_july_Moderate    -1.50      0.48     0.0              -10.40
## 3    Late_july_Extreme    -3.26      0.48     0.0              -22.51
## 4 Late_august_Moderate    -2.94      0.48     0.0              -20.31
## 5  Late_august_Extreme    -3.76      0.49     0.0              -25.95
## 6      bud.typelateral    -0.50      0.30     0.1               -3.45
##   PercentGrowth.se lo.timing
## 1             2.64      late
## 2             3.34      late
## 3             3.34      late
## 4             3.34      late
## 5             3.36      late
## 6             2.09      late
toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowthLate = as.data.frame(resultsAbsAutGrowthLate) %>%
    mutate(term = c("InterceptAbsLate", "Late_july_Moderate", "Late_july_Extreme", "Late_august_Moderate", "Late_august_Extreme", "bud.typelateral")) %>% 
    filter(term != "bud.typelateral") %>% 
  #get relative autumn growth change
  mutate(PercentGrowthChange = estimate/InterceptAbsLate*100,
         PercentGrowth.se = std.error/InterceptAbsLate*100,
         lo.timing = 'late') %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(statistic))%>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, digits=2)

# combine early and late into one df, make term a factor and relevel
toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowth = rbind(toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowthEarly, toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowthLate)

toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowth$term = as.factor(toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowth$term)

toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowth$term = fct_relevel(toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowth$term, "InterceptAbsEarly","InterceptAbsLate","Early_july_Moderate","Late_july_Moderate","Early_july_Extreme","Late_july_Extreme","Early_august_Moderate","Late_august_Moderate","Early_august_Extreme","Late_august_Extreme")

Bud set and absolute growth relationship

# Linear model of bud set doy predicting absolute bud growth
AbsGrowthByEOS.model = BudsSummary %>%
 lm(diff ~ EOS.DOY, data=.)

Bud set and total length relationship

# Linear model of bud set doy predicting total length
LengthByEOS.model = BudsSummary %>%
 lm(bud.length.y ~ EOS.DOY, data=.)

Publication Figures

Bud set figures

## plot only Moderate cooling from combined early and late df using facet_grid spacing with points flipped over y = 0
# collapse groups for facetting
toplot.resultsLMEarlyLate2 = toplot.resultsLMEarlyLate %>% 
  mutate(category = fct_collapse(term, 
                                 July_Moderate = c('groupN','groupO'),
                                 July_Extreme = c('groupP','groupQ'),
                                 August_Moderate = c('groupR','groupS'),
                                 August_Extreme = c('groupT','groupU')))

# plot
LMplotBudSetModerate = ggplot() + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c('#48b649','#2964af'), name = 'Leaf-out timing')+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0)+
  geom_point(data= filter(toplot.resultsLMEarlyLate2, term %in% c("groupN", "groupO", "groupR", "groupS")), 
             aes(x=term, y=-1*estimate, color=lo.timing), size = 3.5,
             position=position_dodge(3))+
  geom_errorbar(data=filter(toplot.resultsLMEarlyLate2, term %in% c("groupN", "groupO", "groupR", "groupS")), 
                aes(x=term, ymin=-1*estimate-1.96*std.error, ymax=-1*estimate+1.96*std.error, color=lo.timing), 
                width=.2, size = 1.5) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-10,10))+
  xlab("")+ylab("Bud set advancement (days)")+
  
  facet_grid(cols = vars(category), scales = 'free_x', space = 'free_x', switch = 'x')+
  plotTheme1 +
  theme(panel.spacing.x = unit(0,"cm"), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.text = element_text(size = 20), axis.title = element_text(size = 22),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 22), strip.placement = 'outside',
        legend.position = "inside", legend.position.inside = c(.82,.18),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20), legend.text = element_text(size = 20)
       )
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
LMplotBudSetModerate
## Warning: `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.
## Warning: `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.

#topptx(figure = LMplotBudSetModerate, filename = 'LMplotBudSetModerate.pptx')
 
#Save PDF
#ggsave(filename = "Fig2b_moderate_flipped.pdf", plot = LMplotBudSetModerate, path = output.path, width = 7, height = 6, useDingbats=FALSE)


####
# plot extreme cooling only from combined early and late df using facet_grid spacing with points flipped over y = 0

LMplotBudSetExtreme = ggplot() + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c('#48b649','#2964af'), name = 'Leaf-out timing')+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0)+
  geom_point(data= filter(toplot.resultsLMEarlyLate2, term %in% c("groupP", "groupQ", "groupT", "groupU")), 
             aes(x=term, y=-1*estimate, color=lo.timing), size = 3.5,
             position=position_dodge(3))+
  geom_errorbar(data=filter(toplot.resultsLMEarlyLate2, term %in% c("groupP", "groupQ", "groupT", "groupU")), 
                aes(x=term, ymin=-1*estimate-1.96*std.error, ymax=-1*estimate+1.96*std.error, color=lo.timing), 
                width=.2, size = 1.5) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-10,10))+
  xlab("")+ylab("Bud set advancement (days)")+
  
  facet_grid(cols = vars(category), scales = 'free_x', space = 'free_x', switch = 'x')+
  plotTheme1 +
  theme(panel.spacing.x = unit(0,"cm"), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.text = element_text(size = 20), axis.title = element_text(size = 22),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 22), strip.placement = 'outside',
        legend.position = "inside", legend.position.inside = c(.82,.18), 
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20), legend.text = element_text(size = 20)
       )

LMplotBudSetExtreme
## Warning: `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.
## `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.

#topptx(figure = LMplotBudSetExtreme, filename = 'LMplotBudSetExtreme.pptx')
#Save PDF
#ggsave(filename = "SuppFig_extreme_flipped.pdf", plot = LMplotBudSetExtreme, path = output.path, width = 7, height = 6, useDingbats=FALSE)

 ################################################################

################################
# plot from all treatments from combined early and late df using facet_grid spacing
# collapse groups for facetting

# plot
LMplotBudSet2 = ggplot() + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c('#48b649','#2964af'))+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0)+
  geom_point(data= filter(toplot.resultsLMEarlyLate2, term %in% c("groupN", "groupO", "groupP", "groupQ", "groupR", "groupS", "groupT", "groupU")), 
             aes(x=term, y=estimate, color=lo.timing),
             position=position_dodge(3))+
  geom_errorbar(data=filter(toplot.resultsLMEarlyLate2, term %in% c("groupN", "groupO", "groupP", "groupQ", "groupR", "groupS", "groupT", "groupU")), 
                aes(x=term, ymin=estimate-1.96*std.error, ymax=estimate+1.96*std.error, color=lo.timing), 
                width=.2, position=position_dodge(.9)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-10,10))+
  xlab("")+ylab("Bud set anomaly (days)")+
  facet_grid(cols = vars(category), scales = 'free_x', space = 'free_x')+
  plotTheme1 +
  theme(panel.spacing.x = unit(0,"cm"), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank())

LMplotBudSet2
## Warning: `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.
## `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.
## `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.
## `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.

#topptx(figure = LMplotBudSet2, filename = 'LMplotBudSet2.pptx')
################################

## Early and late treatment pairs e.g. early_control_control vs late_control_control
# LvsM
LMplot90.LvM = ggplot() + 
  scale_color_manual(values = 'dodgerblue3')+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0)+
  geom_point(data= filter(resultsLM.LvM, term %in% c('groupM')), 
             aes(x=term, y=estimate*-1, color=term),size = 3.5,)+
  geom_errorbar(data=filter(resultsLM.LvM, term %in% c('groupM')), 
                aes(x=term, ymin=-1*estimate-1.96*std.error, ymax=-1*estimate+1.96*std.error, color=term), 
                width=.2, size = 1.5) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-10,10))+
   scale_x_discrete(labels = 'Control') +
  xlab("")+ylab("Bud set advancement (days)")+
  plotTheme1 +
   theme(legend.position = "none", panel.border = element_blank(), axis.text = element_text(size = 18), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20))

LMplot90.LvM

# NvsO
LMplot90.NvO = ggplot() + 
 scale_color_manual(values = 'dodgerblue3')+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0)+
  geom_point(data= filter(resultsLM.NvO, term %in% c('groupO')), 
             aes(x=term, y=estimate*-1, color=term),size = 3.5)+
  geom_errorbar(data=filter(resultsLM.NvO, term %in% c('groupO')), 
                aes(x=term, ymin=-1*estimate-1.96*std.error, ymax=-1*estimate+1.96*std.error, color=term), 
                width=.2, size = 1.5) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-10,10))+
  scale_x_discrete(labels = 'July_Moderate') +
  xlab("")+ylab("")+
  plotTheme1 +
   theme(legend.position = "none", axis.line.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), axis.text = element_text(size = 18))

LMplot90.NvO

# PvsQ
LMplot90.PvQ = ggplot() + 
 scale_color_manual(values = 'dodgerblue3')+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0)+
  geom_point(data= filter(resultsLM.PvQ, term %in% c('groupQ')), 
             aes(x=term, y=estimate*-1, color=term),size = 3.5)+
  geom_errorbar(data=filter(resultsLM.PvQ, term %in% c('groupQ')), 
                aes(x=term, ymin=-1*estimate-1.96*std.error, ymax=-1*estimate+1.96*std.error, color=term), 
                width=.2,size = 1.5) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-10,10))+
  scale_x_discrete(labels = 'July_Extreme') +
  xlab("")+ylab("")+
  plotTheme1 +
 theme(legend.position = "none", axis.line.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), axis.text = element_text(size = 18))

LMplot90.PvQ

# RvsS
LMplot90.RvS = ggplot() + 
 scale_color_manual(values = 'dodgerblue3')+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0)+
  geom_point(data= filter(resultsLM.RvS, term %in% c('groupS')), 
             aes(x=term, y=estimate*-1, color=term),size = 3.5)+
  geom_errorbar(data=filter(resultsLM.RvS, term %in% c('groupS')), 
                aes(x=term, ymin=-1*estimate-1.96*std.error, ymax=-1*estimate+1.96*std.error, color=term), 
                width=.2,size = 1.5) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-10,10))+
  scale_x_discrete(labels = 'August_Moderate') +
  xlab("")+ylab("")+
  plotTheme1 +
  theme(legend.position = "none", axis.line.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), axis.text = element_text(size = 18))

LMplot90.RvS

# TvsU
LMplot90.TvU = ggplot() + 
 scale_color_manual(values = 'dodgerblue3')+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0)+
  geom_point(data= filter(resultsLM.TvU, term %in% c('groupU')), 
             aes(x=term, y=estimate*-1, color=term),size = 3.5)+
  geom_errorbar(data=filter(resultsLM.TvU, term %in% c('groupU')), 
                aes(x=term, ymin=-1*estimate-1.96*std.error, ymax=-1*estimate+1.96*std.error, color=term), 
                width=.2,size = 1.5) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-10,10))+
    scale_x_discrete(labels = 'August_Extreme') +
  xlab("")+ylab("")+
  plotTheme1 +
  theme(legend.position = "none", axis.line.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), axis.text = element_text(size = 18))

LMplot90.TvU

################################

# bud set by leaf-out timing boxplot
 lo.eos.boxplot = 
BudsSummary %>% ggplot(aes(lo.timing, EOS, fill = lo.timing)) + 
  geom_boxplot(notch = T) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('#48b649','#2964af')) +
   xlab('')+ylab("Bud set date") +
  plotTheme1 + 
  theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text = element_text(size = 20), axis.title = element_text(size = 22), axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 15))
  # ggtitle('Leaf-out timing')

 lo.eos.boxplot

#######################################
## Save plots
#######################################

# Early vs Late budset boxplot
#topptx(figure = lo.eos.boxplot, filename = 'early_vs_late_boxplot.pptx')
 
 #ggsave(filename = 'BudSetBoxplot.pdf', plot = lo.eos.boxplot, path = output.path, height = 6, width = 7)


######################################################################################

#Merge anomaly plots
CombinedBudSepPlotEarlyLate2 = LMplot90.LvM | LMplot90.NvO | LMplot90.PvQ | LMplot90.RvS | LMplot90.TvU
  
CombinedBudSepPlotEarlyLate2

#topptx(figure= CombinedBudSepPlotEarlyLate2, filename = 'CombinedBudSepPlotEarlyLate2.pptx')

#ggsave(filename = 'SuppFig_all_treatments.pdf', plot = CombinedBudSepPlotEarlyLate2, path = output.path, height = 6, width = 11)

Relative Bud growth figures

# Bud length curves
###################

#move points .05 to the left and right
pd = position_dodge(2) 


# Relative bud length
RelBudLength_curve = bud.df %>%
  mutate(Treatment = factor(group, 
  levels=c("L", "M", "N", "O", "P", "Q", "R", "S", "T", "U"))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=measurement.date, y=bud.rel*100, colour=Treatment, group=Treatment)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 20, colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 30, colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 40, colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 50, colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 60, colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 70, colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 80, colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 90, colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 100, colour="lightgrey")+
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date('2023-11-01'), colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date('2023-10-01'), colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date('2023-09-01'), colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date('2023-08-01'), colour="lightgrey")+
  
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom="line", size = 1.2, position=pd, alpha=0.7) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom="errorbar", size = 0.8, width=0, position=pd) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom="point", size = 1.2, position=pd) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = budpal)+
  
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(20,100),xlim=c(as.Date(c('2023-07-04','2023-11-02'))))+
  
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Relative bud length (%)") +
  plotTheme1

RelBudLength_curve

#####################################################################
## plot from combined early and late df using facet_grid spacing
# collapse groups for facetting
toplot.resultsRelAutGrowth = toplot.resultsRelAutGrowth %>% 
  mutate(category = fct_collapse(term, 
                  July_Moderate = c('Early_july_Moderate','Late_july_Moderate'),
                  July_Extreme = c('Early_july_Extreme','Late_july_Extreme'),
                  August_Moderate = c('Early_august_Moderate','Late_august_Moderate'),
                  August_Extreme = c('Early_august_Extreme','Late_august_Extreme')))

# plot
LMplotRelAutGrowth2 = ggplot() + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c('#48b649','#2964af'))+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0)+
  geom_point(data= filter(toplot.resultsRelAutGrowth, term %in% c("Early_july_Moderate", "Late_july_Moderate", "Early_july_Extreme", "Late_july_Extreme", "Early_august_Moderate", "Late_august_Moderate", "Early_august_Extreme", "Late_august_Extreme")), 
             aes(x=term, y=PercentGrowthChange, color=lo.timing), size = 3.5,
             position=position_dodge(3))+
  geom_errorbar(data=filter(toplot.resultsRelAutGrowth, term %in% c("Early_july_Moderate", "Late_july_Moderate", "Early_july_Extreme", "Late_july_Extreme", "Early_august_Moderate", "Late_august_Moderate", "Early_august_Extreme", "Late_august_Extreme")), 
                aes(x=term, ymin=PercentGrowthChange+1.96*PercentGrowth.se, ymax=PercentGrowthChange-1.96*PercentGrowth.se, color=lo.timing), 
                width=.2, size = 1.5) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-20,10))+
  xlab("")+ylab("Relative bud growth anomaly (%)")+
  facet_grid(cols = vars(category), scales = 'free_x', space = 'free_x', switch = 'x') +
  plotTheme1 +
  theme(panel.spacing.x = unit(0,"cm"), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.text = element_text(size = 20), axis.title = element_text(size = 22),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 22), strip.placement = 'outside',
        legend.position = c(.85, .9), legend.title = element_text(size = 20), legend.text = element_text(size = 20), panel.border = element_blank())
## Warning: A numeric `legend.position` argument in `theme()` was deprecated in ggplot2
## 3.5.0.
## ℹ Please use the `legend.position.inside` argument of `theme()` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
LMplotRelAutGrowth2
## Warning: `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.
## Warning: `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.
## `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.
## `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.

#ggsave(filename = 'SuppFig_RelGrowth.pdf', plot = LMplotRelAutGrowth2, path = output.path, height = 10, width = 11)

Absolute Bud Growth figures

## plot from combined early and late df using facet_grid spacing
# collapse groups for facetting
toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowth = toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowth %>% 
  mutate(category = fct_collapse(term, 
                  July_Moderate = c('Early_july_Moderate','Late_july_Moderate'),
                  July_Extreme = c('Early_july_Extreme','Late_july_Extreme'),
                  August_Moderate = c('Early_august_Moderate','Late_august_Moderate'),
                  August_Extreme = c('Early_august_Extreme','Late_august_Extreme')))

# plot
LMplotAbsAutGrowth2 = ggplot() + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c('#48b649','#2964af'))+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0)+
  geom_point(data= filter(toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowth, term %in% c("Early_july_Moderate", "Late_july_Moderate", "Early_july_Extreme", "Late_july_Extreme", "Early_august_Moderate", "Late_august_Moderate", "Early_august_Extreme", "Late_august_Extreme")), 
             aes(x=term, y=PercentGrowthChange, color=lo.timing), size = 3.5,
             position=position_dodge(3))+
  geom_errorbar(data=filter(toplot.resultsAbsAutGrowth, term %in% c("Early_july_Moderate", "Late_july_Moderate", "Early_july_Extreme", "Late_july_Extreme", "Early_august_Moderate", "Late_august_Moderate", "Early_august_Extreme", "Late_august_Extreme")), 
                aes(x=term, ymin=PercentGrowthChange+1.96*PercentGrowth.se, ymax=PercentGrowthChange-1.96*PercentGrowth.se, color=lo.timing), 
                width=.2, size = 1.5) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-40,10))+
  xlab("")+ylab("Absolute bud growth anomaly (%)")+
  facet_grid(cols = vars(category), scales = 'free_x', space = 'free_x', switch = 'x') +
  plotTheme1 +
  theme(panel.spacing.x = unit(0,"cm"), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.text = element_text(size = 20), axis.title = element_text(size = 22),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 22), strip.placement = 'outside',
        legend.position = c(.85, .9), legend.title = element_text(size = 20), legend.text = element_text(size = 20), panel.border = element_blank())

LMplotAbsAutGrowth2
## Warning: `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.
## `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.
## `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.
## `position_dodge()` requires non-overlapping x intervals.

#ggsave(filename = 'SuppFig_AutGrowth.pdf', plot = LMplotAbsAutGrowth2, path = output.path, height = 10, width = 11)


#########################################

# PLOT bud set timing ~ Abs Bud Growth
AbsGrowthByBudSetPlot = ggplot(BudsSummary, aes(EOS.DOY,diff)) +
 stat_poly_line() +
  stat_poly_eq(use_label("eq")) +
  stat_poly_eq(label.y = 0.9, size = 2.5) +
  geom_point()+
  ylab('Absolute bud growth (mm)')+xlab('Bud set DOY')+
  plotTheme1 + 
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 22))

AbsGrowthByBudSetPlot

#ggsave('/Users/dominic/Documents/Crowther/r/phen_exp_2023/figures/buds/AbsGrowthByBudSet.pdf', height = 7, width = 10)

Bud length

# Plot total length ~ bud set timing
FinalLengthByBudSetPlot = ggplot(BudsSummary, aes(EOS.DOY,bud.length.y)) +
 stat_poly_line() +
  stat_poly_eq(use_label("eq")) +
  stat_poly_eq(label.y = 0.9, size = 4) +
  geom_point()+
  ylab('Final bud length (mm)')+xlab('Bud set DOY')+
  plotTheme1 + 
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 22))

FinalLengthByBudSetPlot

#ggsave(paste(output.path, 'SuppFig_FinalLengthByBudSet.pdf', sep = '/'), height = 7, width = 10)


# plot relative bud length for all individs
individ.relbud.curves = bud.df %>% ggplot(
  aes(x=measurement.date,y=bud.rel*100,colour = group, fill = group)) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date('2023-11-01'), colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date('2023-10-01'), colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date('2023-09-01'), colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date('2023-08-01'), colour="lightgrey")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date('2023-07-01'), colour="lightgrey")+
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 90, colour="lightgrey")+

  
  geom_line(aes(x=measurement.date, y=bud.rel*100, group = bud.type), color="black")+
  geom_point()+
  
  geom_vline(data=BudsSummary, 
             aes(xintercept = EOS), linetype = "dashed", colour = 'blue')+
  
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(4,110),xlim=c(as.Date(c('2023-07-02','2023-11-04'))))+
  
  xlab("Date") +
  ylab("Relative bud length (%)") +
    facet_wrap(~id, dir='v', nrow = 15) +
    plotTheme1 +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
  
individ.relbud.curves

  #Save PDF
#ggsave('/Users/dominic/Documents/Crowther/r/phen_exp_2023/figures/individ_relbud_curves.pdf', height = 40, width = 40)

Reproducibility

## [109] flextable_0.9.9         rlang_1.1.6             multcomp_1.4-28
